message:
fix(update): defer cadence persistence until successful fetch, extract handle_fatal_error

Two improvements:

1. Update check resilience (update_check.rs):
   - Move state.mark_checked() + state.save() from before the HTTP
     fetch to after successful fetch and version parsing
   - Prevents transient network failures from writing the "last checked"
     timestamp, which would suppress retry attempts for the entire
     1-hour check interval
   - Replace async reqwest::Client fetch with spawn_blocking call to
     fetch_latest_release_blocking (removes reqwest::Client dependency)
   - Add two integration tests: failed sync and async checks verify no
     state file is persisted, confirming future checks aren't throttled

2. Error handler deduplication (main.rs):
   - Extract duplicated error-handling block (JSON detection, robot-mode
     wrapping, human-readable fallback, process::exit) into top-level
     handle_fatal_error(err: CliError) -> ! function
   - Both Err arms in main() now delegate to the shared function
   - Pure deduplication, ~25 line reduction, no behavioral change

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
